title: Interpretation Policy (domain overrides)
description: this sidecar now carries only interpretation-specific overrides: the `verifiableEntities` block consumed by the core claim verifier. The shared claim-boundary shape is validated against `_policy-skeleton.schema.json` by the loader.

entityNamePatterns.description: Regular expressions identifying entity names in narrative prose (e.g. gene symbols, protein IDs, endpoint codes).

entityNameExcludePatterns.description: Anchored regex patterns (e.g. '^DNA$') for tokens that must be excluded after entity-pattern matching. Used to suppress common-noun acronyms (RNA, PCR, DNA, WHO) that the broad gene-symbol regex otherwise captures. Optional — absent field treated as empty denylist.

effectSizeColumns.description: Column headers where effect sizes appear in result tables; the verifier tries each in order.

entityColumns.description: Column headers where entity names appear; used to locate the row for a given claim.
